# Ali R. Salman, MD

Ali R. Salman, MD is a board-certified ophthalmologist and fellowship-trained vitreoretinal surgeon serving Northern Virginia, Southern Maryland, and Washington, D.C.

## Core pages
- Home: https://dralisalman.com/
- About Dr. Salman: https://dralisalman.com/about/
- Conditions Treated: https://dralisalman.com/conditions-treated/
- Secure Contact / Inquiry: https://dralisalman.com/contact/
- Referring Doctors: https://dralisalman.com/refer-a-patient/
- Blog: https://dralisalman.com/blog/

## Clinical focus
- Macular degeneration
- Diabetic retinopathy
- Retinal vascular disease
- Retinal detachment
- Macular hole
- Epiretinal membrane
- Other medical and surgical retina conditions

## Credentials
- Board-certified ophthalmologist
- Fellowship-trained in vitreoretinal surgery
- Mayo Clinic ophthalmology residency
- Retina Consultants of Minnesota fellowship
- Published peer-reviewed research, chapters, and professional manuscripts
- Invited reviewer for retina and ophthalmology journals
- Longstanding humanitarian work with United2Heal

## Contact
- Email: info@dralisalman.com
- Secure inquiry page: https://dralisalman.com/contact/
